{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Huan
| aliases = Huan, Blackflame Emperor Naru Huan, Emperor Naru Huan, Emperor (Cradle), The Emperor (Cradle), Blackflame Emperor, Emperor Naru
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[wind madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, Blackflame sword}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, fighting against Blackflame, blasts of wind}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Emperor, Overlord}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[Jai Patriarch|Patriarch]], sole leader of the Blackflame Empire}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|, Emperor Naru the Second, [[Naru Huan|Blackflame Emperor]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, Emperor of the Blackflame Empire}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru clan]], [[Blackflame Empire]], [[Skysworn]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame Empire]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emperor's cloudship]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Naru Huan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru]] Huan is the current ruler and [[Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch]] of the [[Naru clan]], serving as [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. He ascended to the [[throne]] approximately fifty years ago after the previous ruling family, the [[Blackflame{{!}}Blackflames]], faded away. As an Overlord, he possesses immense power and is noted for his heroic presence, characterized by a muscular build, a trimmed beard, and large, shimmering emerald wings associated with the [[Path of Grasping Sky]]. He is also a skilled combatant who utilizes a [[Blackflame]] greatsword, an Overlord-level weapon capable of immense [[destruction]]. In his role as Emperor, [[Naru]] Huan manages a vast territory that has faced significant instability and territorial loss over recent generations. He oversees various major clans, such as the [[Jai]] and [[Kotai]], and commands powerful [[Underlord{{!}}Underlords]] like [[Chon Ma]] and [[Naru Gwei]]. His leadership has been tested by severe crises, including the devastating impact of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] and various external threats from the [[Seishen Empire]] and [[Redmoon Hall]]. Despite these challenges, he maintains imperial [[Authority{{!}}authority]] through a combination of political maneuvering, military command of the [[Skysworn]], and personal strength. He has also maintained complex relationships with influential figures like [[Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius]], seeking both counsel and alliance to preserve the stability of his empire.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor's support will arrive once a winner is made clear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor's forces would cripple an aggressor in a day if war were declared openly.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor is a figure [[Naru Cassias Arelius{{!}}Cassias]] believes will not allow certain actions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor holds the title to the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]] and has reached the Overlord stage.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] could have assigned [[Eithan]] as the temporary guardian of the western territories while the [[Jai]] dissolved into infighting.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] uses [[wind madra]] to cushion a glass.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor received a [[dream tablets{{!}}dream tablet]] from an [[Underlord]] demanding punishment for [[Eithan]]'s actions in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor is drinking wine.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] intends to bring word of the situation to [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Emperor is gathering his [[Underlord{{!}}Underlords]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Huan]] is the [[Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch]] of the [[Naru clan]] and the sole leader of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Huan]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] serve in the name of [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] is the [[Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor]]'s little sister.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] is [[Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru]] the Second.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Emperor ordered that operations follow [[Naru Gwei]]'s orders.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] nodded after thinking for a moment.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] may work for [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There was a last [[Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The expedition was fueled by [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]]’s power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor wore green [[sacred artist's robe{{!}}sacred artist's robes]] and had wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor possesses a [[Blackflame]] [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor of the [[Blackflame Empire]] possesses emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru Huan]] has emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Huan]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru Huan]]'s weapon is a long, straight-bladed [[sword]] made of black glass.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor held a celebratory feast.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Huan]] is [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Huan]] holds the title of Emperor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] advises [[Lindon]] to present himself to [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]] upon returning to [[The Empire{{!}}the Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor]] was discussed for execution due to dereliction of duty.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Huan]] intends to put [[Eithan]] to work.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is aboard the [[Emperor's cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Emperor is from the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor]] is an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] remained hovering in midair after greeting them.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]]'s sister sent him word from the [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is practiced in fighting against [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] possesses several sacred weapons designed for fighting [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] did not tell [[Emperor (Elder Empire){{!}}the Emperor]] about his combat advantages.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor]] issued an order for [[Lowgold]] or higher [[sacred artists]] to report to the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru Huan]] is involved in an Overlord-level battle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Emperor can release blasts of [[wind]] that tear apart trees.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor Naru Huan]] has wide emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“You will operate according to Naru Gwei’s orders.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“When you make it back to the Empire,” she said, "present yourself to the Emperor. You have done us proud."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“The Emperor of the…Blackflame Empire? And where is he?”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“How advanced is he?” Jaran asked.

“Overlord.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"My sister sent me word from the Uncrowned King tournament as soon as she could, but I heard nothing from you."<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
